title: Implement fuzz testing targets
description: Implement Section 9 of testing-strategy.md. Three fuzz targets: FuzzParseBytes (parser crash finding per language), FuzzParseCorpusFile (corpus test infrastructure), FuzzScannerSerializeRoundTrip (scanner state round-trip). Add seed corpus extraction helper. Add CI job for nightly fuzz runs.
close_reason: Implemented in 8fa67ee on feat/fuzz-testing. 15 parser fuzz targets + corpus parser fuzz + scanner roundtrip fuzz + seed extraction tool.
